Artificial Intelligence.summary: In this post, we'll break down six key concepts in artificial intelligence (including AI itself) so that you can better understand what this field is all about. AI applications are becoming increasingly common in a wide variety of industries, including healthcare, finance, retail, and manufacturing.   Dive into the world of AI with this comprehensive guide to understanding key concepts and terminology, perfect for beginners and enthusiasts .

ranked_papers.title: The future of artificial intelligence: Insights from recent Delphi studies
